case_title: CITY HOUSING, INC. VS. MICHAEL RUSSO et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON DEC-09-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-04-2002 - CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE IS CONFIRMED. COMMISSIONER LORETTA M. NORRIS; CLERK: P. DIAS; REPORTER: DIANA PADILLA.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSO, MICHAEL
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RUSSO, MICHAEL
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-09-2002 - CASE SETTLED.
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT RUSSO, MICHAEL AS TO PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-04-2002 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 218

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUSSO, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 909 GEARY STREET #605 SAN FRANCISCO CA., STAYED UNTIL JAN-14-2003, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH; STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION THROUGH 1/14/03. PLTF. WAIVES PAST DUE RENT AND DAILY DAMAGES. IF DEFT. FAILS TO VACATE BY 1/14/03, AMENDED JUDGMENT GRANTED TO PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFT. FOR BACK RENT OF $920.00 AND DAILY DAMAGES OF $15.33 PER DAY FROM 12/1/02 TO 1/14/03 TOGETHER WITH COST OF $199.30 FOR TOTAL AMENDED JUDGMENT OF $1,809.15. EACH PARTY WAIVES CLAIMS AND CAUSE OF ACTION THAT THEY MAY HAVE AGAINST THE OTHER PARTY AND GENERALLY RELEASES THE OTHER PARTY FROM LIABILITY FOR CLAIMS OR CAUSES OF ACTION THAT MAY HAVE ARISEN THROUGH THE TENANCY INCLUDING THOSE THAT THEY MAY HAVE UNDER CIVIL CODE SECTION 1542. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR ADDITIONAL DETAILS. SECURITY DEPOSIT IS FORFEITED TO PLAINTIFF; PLAINTIFF IS NOT REQUIRED TO ACCOUNT FOR IT. PLAINTIFF TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS THE CASE WITH PREJUDICE IF DEFENDANT ABIDES BY THE ABOVE TERMS AND CONDITIONS.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSO, MICHAEL
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSO, MICHAEL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER RUSSO, MICHAEL ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-04-2002 2:00 PM FOR DEPT 218
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $15.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER RUSSO, MICHAEL ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER RUSSO, MICHAEL ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-09-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Diana Padilla. Arnold W. Evje, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, City Housing, Inc. and Defendant, Michael Russo appeared in pro per. The matter did not settle and the trial date is confirmed.
